details.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS 客户总数 FROM dim_customer
details.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dc.customer_id) AS 客户总数 FROM dim_customer dc

details.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) AS 商品总数 FROM dim_product
details.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fo.product_id) AS 商品总数 FROM fact_order fo

details.expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT region_name AS 地区 FROM dim_region
details.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT region_name AS 地区 FROM dim_region

details.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_level) AS 会员等级数 FROM dim_customer
details.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dc.member_level) AS 会员等级数 FROM dim_customer dc

details.expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT category AS 品类 FROM dim_product
details.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT category AS 品类 FROM dim_product

details.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(order_id) AS 订单总数 FROM fact_order
details.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(fo.order_id) AS 订单总数 FROM fact_order fo

details.query: 最大的订单金额是多少
details.expected_sql: SELECT MAX(order_amount) AS 最大订单金额 FROM fact_order
details.generated_sql: SELECT MAX(fo.order_amount) AS 最大订单金额 FROM fact_order fo

details.expected_sql: SELECT MIN(order_amount) AS 最小订单金额 FROM fact_order
details.generated_sql: SELECT MIN(fo.order_amount) AS 最小订单金额 FROM fact_order fo

details.expected_sql: SELECT AVG(order_amount) AS 平均订单金额 FROM fact_order
SELECT DISTINCT payment_method AS 支付方式 FROM fact_order

details.query: 查一下华东上个月的销售额
details.difficulty: 多表 JOIN + 时间过滤
details.expected_sql:
SELECT SUM(fact_order.order_amount) AS 销售额
                          FROM fact_order
                          JOIN dim_region ON fact_order.region_id = dim_region.region_id
                          WHERE dim_region.region_name = '华东'
                            AND fact_order.date_id >= 20260601
                            AND fact_order.date_id < 20260701
details.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(fo.order_amount) AS 销售额 FROM fact_order fo INNER JOIN dim_region dr ON fo.region_id = dr.region_id WHERE (fo.date_id BETWEEN 20260601 AND 20260630) AND (dr.region_name = '华东') AND (fo.date_id BETWEEN 20260601 AND 20260630)
details.error:
(pymysql.err.OperationalError) (1054, "Unknown column 'fact_order.date_id' in 'where clause'")
[SQL: explain SELECT SUM(fo.order_amount) AS 销售额 FROM fact_order fo INNER JOIN dim_region dr ON fo.region_id = dr.region_id WHERE (fact_order.date_id BETWEEN 20260601 AND 20260630) AND (dr.region_name = '华东') AND (fo.date_id BETWEEN 20260601 AND 20260630)]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/e3q8)

details.query: 每个品类的销量是多少
details.expected_sql:
SELECT dim_product.category AS 品类, SUM(fact_order.order_quantity) AS 销量
                          FROM fact_order
                          JOIN dim_product ON fact_order.product_id = dim_product.product_id
                          GROUP BY dim_product.category
details.generated_sql: SELECT dp.category AS 品类, SUM(fo.order_quantity) AS 销量 FROM fact_order fo INNER JOIN dim_product dp ON fo.product_id = dp.product_id GROUP BY dp.category

details.expected_sql:
SELECT SUM(fact_order.order_amount) AS 订单总额
                          FROM fact_order
                          JOIN dim_customer ON fact_order.customer_id = dim_customer.customer_id
                          WHERE dim_customer.member_level = '黄金'
details.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(fo.order_amount) AS 订单总额 FROM fact_order fo INNER JOIN dim_customer dc ON fo.customer_id = dc.customer_id WHERE (dc.member_level = '黄金')

details.expected_sql:
SELECT SUM(fact_order.order_amount) AS 销售额
                          FROM fact_order
                          JOIN dim_product ON fact_order.product_id = dim_product.product_id
                          WHERE dim_product.category = '手机数码'
details.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(fo.order_amount) AS 销售额 FROM fact_order fo INNER JOIN dim_product dp ON fo.product_id = dp.product_id WHERE (dp.category = '手机数码')

details.expected_sql:
SELECT dim_region.region_name AS 地区, COUNT(DISTINCT fact_order.customer_id) AS 客户数
                          FROM fact_order
                          JOIN dim_region ON fact_order.region_id = dim_region.region_id
                          GROUP BY dim_region.region_name
details.generated_sql: SELECT dr.region_name AS 地区, COUNT(DISTINCT fo.customer_id) AS 客户数 FROM fact_order fo INNER JOIN dim_region dr ON fo.region_id = dr.region_id GROUP BY dr.region_name
